note: Created RekeyDataContinuityTests.cs with integration test that: (1) establishes tunnel and records initial handshake count, (2) sends data before rekey, (3) sends periodic keep-alive data while waiting for REKEY_AFTER_TIME (~120s), (4) uses HandshakeObserver.WaitForRekeyAsync to detect rekey on both peers, (5) asserts handshake count >= 2, (6) verifies data integrity during and after rekey. Build passes cleanly. Cannot run integration tests in this environment (no native lib).
